title: [COBBLEMON ADDON] Lightweight - No Ride Fall Damage
description: This mod disables fall damage for the player and entity that is being ridden. This is especially annoying when playing Cobblemon and riding entities that cannot fly, making it almost useless to ride anything besides flying Pokémon.
body:
A very small QOL Mod that disables fall damage when riding entities such as horses for both the player and the entity.

The main intent for this mod was to disable fall damage when riding Pokémon in [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) paired with the [Cobblemon: Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-ride-on) Side-Mod. Fall damage made it basically impossible to ride fast land Pokémon as they would almost immediately die from fall damage. This might be redundant with the future 1.7 update of Cobblemon if they decide to disable fall damage there as well.
